SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Agent
A software agent that reacts to messages published on Topics.
BinOpAgent
An agent that performs a binary operation over two input topics and publishes the result to one output topic.
Config
A bundle that knows how to instantiate a particular set of agents and topic subscriptions, i.e.
ConfLoader
Servlet bound to POST /upload.
GenericConfig
Reads a text-based description of a publish/subscribe topology and instantiates every agent it describes, wrapped in ParallelAgent.
Graph
The directed graph that mirrors a publish/subscribe topology.
HtmlGraphWriter
Generates the browser-facing HTML view for a Graph.
HtmlLoader
Serves static HTML files out of a configured directory in response to any GET /app/... request.
HTTPServer
Generic HTTP server abstraction.
IncAgent
Single-input increment agent used by GenericConfig.
Main
Entry point of the Advanced Programming project.
MathExampleConfig
The (a+b) * (a-b) sample computational graph from the Exercise 3 PDF.
Message
An immutable carrier of information that flows through the publish/subscribe graph.
MyHTTPServer
A minimal homemade HTTP server.
Node
Vertex in a directed graph that represents the runtime topology of a publish/subscribe computational graph.
ParallelAgent
Active Object decorator for Agent.
PlusAgent
Two-input addition agent used by GenericConfig.
RequestParser
Parses a simplified HTTP/1.1 request out of a BufferedReader into a RequestParser.RequestInfo value object.
RequestParser.RequestInfo
Immutable bag of fields produced by RequestParser.parseRequest(BufferedReader).
Servlet
Pluggable HTTP request handler.
Topic
A named broadcast channel that agents can subscribe to or publish through.
TopicDisplayer
Servlet bound to GET /publish.
TopicManagerSingleton
The single registry of every Topic in the system.
TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
The actual manager.
TopicReset
Servlet bound to GET /reset.
